papers.title_en: Autonomous skeletal landmark localization toward agentic C-arm control
papers.tldr: 本研究针对急诊手术中C型臂自动定位的需求，提出了一种自主骨骼地标定位方法，旨在实现代理式（agentic）C型臂控制。传统深度学习方法在失效时需人工干预，而该方法通过提高地标定位的自主性，增强了系统在复杂临床环境下的鲁棒性，为实现全自动手术影像导航和减少医生负担提供了新方案。
papers.abstract_en: Purpose Automated C-arm positioning ensures timely treatment in patients requiringemergent interventions. When a conventional deep learning (DL) approach for C-arm control fails, clinicians must revert to manual operation, resulting in additional …

papers.title_en: Artificial Intelligence–Assisted Evaluation of Alara Compliance in Pediatric Chest Radiography
papers.tldr: 本研究针对儿童对电离辐射的高敏感性，探讨了利用人工智能技术评估儿科胸部X射线检查中ALARA（尽可能低剂量）原则的合规性。通过AI自动化分析，研究旨在建立一种客观的评估机制，以确保在保证诊断质量的同时最小化辐射暴露。该方法为儿科放射实践的质量控制和辐射防护优化提供了重要技术支持。
papers.abstract_en: Background Pediatric radiology requires strict adherence to the ALARA principle (AsLow As Reasonably Achievable), which refers to minimizing radiation exposure asmuch as possible, due to children's high sensitivity to ionizing radiation. Objective …

papers.title_en: Unique Peritumoral Patterns Unveiled by Quantitative Multiparametric MRI and Their Diagnostic and Prognostic Value in Treated Malignant Gliomas
papers.tldr: 本研究针对恶性胶质瘤术后复发与治疗相关变化难以区分的临床痛点，利用定量多参数MRI技术深入挖掘瘤周区域的独特影像特征。通过对瘤周模式的定量分析，研究揭示了其在鉴别肿瘤进展与治疗反应中的关键作用，并评估了其对患者预后的预测价值。该研究强调了瘤周微环境在胶质瘤管理中的重要性，为临床精准诊疗提供了新的影像学依据。
papers.abstract_en: Malignant gliomas remain among the most challenging brain tumors to manage, withhigh recurrence rates and difficulty in distinguishing progression from treatment-related changes. While the peritumoral region offers valuable insights into tumor …

papers.title_en: Advancing Radiograph Representation Learning via Cascading Graph Alignment for Vision-Language Clinical Concepts
papers.tldr: 本研究针对放射影像与报告预训练中临床概念对齐不充分的问题，提出了级联图对齐（Cascading Graph Alignment）框架。该方法通过显式构建图结构来对齐视觉与文本中的关键临床概念，克服了传统隐式对齐难以捕捉显著临床特征的局限性。实验证明，该方法显著提升了放射影像的特征表示能力，在多项下游医学影像任务中取得了优异表现，为医疗视觉语言预训练提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Vision-language pre-training on paired radiology images and reports has showngreat potential to promote downstream image tasks. However, its potential is far fromfully unleashed when conducting implicit alignment for clinically significant concepts …

papers.title_en: An Interpretable Radiomics Model Based on Multi‐DLCT Images for Differentiating Benign and Malignant Solid Solitary Pulmonary Nodules
papers.tldr: 本研究针对具有高侵袭性的孤立性肺实性结节（SPN），开发了一种基于多参数双层光谱探测器CT（DLCT）图像的可解释影像组学模型。通过挖掘DLCT提供的多维光谱信息，该模型旨在提高临床对良恶性实性结节的鉴别能力。研究结果证明了该模型在辅助早期肺癌诊断中的有效性，并为影像组学特征提供了生物学解释，对实现肺癌的早期精准诊疗具有重要临床价值。
papers.abstract_en: Background Early‐stage lung cancer frequently presents as a solitary pulmonarynodule. Compared with subsolid pulmonary nodules, solid pulmonary nodules areassociated with greater invasiveness, earlier metastasis, faster growth, and worse …

papers.title_en: ENC-Bench: A Benchmark for Evaluating Multimodal Large Language Models in Electronic Navigational Chart Understanding
papers.tldr: 电子航海图（ENC）是现代航海安全的核心，但多模态大模型（MLLM）在理解此类专业图表方面的能力尚不明确。本文提出了ENC-Bench，这是首个专门用于评估MLLM对电子航海图理解能力的基准测试。该基准针对ENC与普通图像的显著差异，系统评估了模型在航海安全关键信息提取和空间推理方面的表现，填补了海事领域大模型评估的空白。
papers.abstract_en: Electronic Navigational Charts (ENCs) are the safety-critical backbone of modernmaritime navigation, yet it remains unclear whether multimodal large languagemodels (MLLMs) can reliably interpret them. Unlike natural images or conventional …

papers.title_en: VISion On Request: Enhanced VLLM efficiency with sparse, dynamically selected, vision-language interactions
papers.tldr: 针对大型视觉语言模型（LVLM）中视觉标记缩减导致的信息瓶颈问题，本文提出了VISion On Request (VISOR) 框架。该方法摒弃了传统的静态标记压缩，转而采用稀疏且动态选择的视觉-语言交互机制，使模型能根据生成需求灵活提取视觉信息。这种方法在显著提升推理效率的同时，有效避免了性能损失，为构建高效且高性能的LVLM提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Existing approaches for improving the efficiency of Large Vision-Language Models(LVLMs) are largely based on the concept of visual token reduction. This approach,however, creates an information bottleneck that impairs performance, especially on …

papers.title_en: SIGMA: Structure-Invariant Generative Molecular Alignment for Chemical Language Models via Autoregressive Contrastive Learning
papers.tldr: 本研究针对化学语言模型中分子线性字符串（如SMILES）与图结构之间的多对一映射导致的模态不匹配问题，提出了SIGMA框架。该方法通过自回归对比学习，使模型能够学习到结构不变的分子表示。SIGMA在保持自回归生成能力的同时，增强了模型对分子结构的理解，显著提升了分子生成和属性预测的性能。
papers.abstract_en: Linearized string representations serve as the foundation of scalable autoregressivemolecular generation; however, they introduce a fundamental modality mismatchwhere a single molecular graph maps to multiple distinct sequences. This ambiguity …

papers.title_en: Learning the Signature of Memorization in Autoregressive Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对微调语言模型的成员推理攻击（MIA）展开，指出传统方法依赖人工启发式规则（如损失阈值、Min-K%等）的局限性。作者提出了首个可迁移的学习型攻击方法，通过学习自回归模型中的记忆特征而非依赖直觉设计，显著提升了识别模型是否记忆了特定训练数据的能力，为评估大模型隐私风险提供了新工具。
papers.abstract_en: All prior membership inference attacks for fine-tuned language models use hand-crafted heuristics (eg, loss thresholding, Min-K\%, reference calibration), eachbounded by the designer's intuition. We introduce the first transferable learned …

papers.title_en: CoME-VL: Scaling Complementary Multi-Encoder Vision-Language Learning
papers.tldr: 针对现有视觉语言模型过度依赖单一对比学习编码器（如CLIP）导致特征提取不全面的局限，本文提出了CoME-VL框架。该框架通过集成多个具有互补特性的视觉编码器（如结合对比学习与自监督学习模型），实现了视觉语言学习的有效扩展。研究证明，这种多编码器协作模式能显著增强模型对复杂视觉信息的理解能力，在多项视觉语言任务中刷新了性能记录。
papers.abstract_en: Recent vision-language models (VLMs) typically rely on a single vision encodertrained with contrastive image-text objectives, such as CLIP-style pretraining. Whilecontrastive encoders are effective for cross-modal alignment and retrieval, self …

papers.title_en: Saliency-R1: Enforcing Interpretable and Faithful Vision-language Reasoning via Saliency-map Alignment Reward
papers.tldr: 本研究针对视觉语言模型（VLM）过度依赖文本线索而忽视视觉证据的问题，提出了Saliency-R1框架。该方法通过引入显著性图对齐奖励，在强化学习过程中强制模型的推理逻辑与关键视觉区域对齐，从而显著提升了模型在视觉推理任务中的可解释性与忠实度，有效缓解了模型“指鹿为马”的幻觉问题。
papers.abstract_en: Vision-language models (VLMs) have achieved remarkable success across diversetasks. However, concerns about their trustworthiness persist, particularly regardingtendencies to lean more on textual cues than visual evidence and the risk of …

papers.title_en: The Illusion of Superposition? A Principled Analysis of Latent Thinking in Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究深入探讨了大语言模型中“潜空间思维”（Latent CoT）的机制，这是一种利用连续向量空间而非离散文本进行推理的新兴方法。文章重点分析了连续空间是否如假设般通过“叠加态”提升了模型的表达能力，通过理论与实证研究，系统评估了潜空间推理在处理复杂逻辑任务时的效率与局限性，为理解模型内部隐式推理提供了重要理论支撑。
papers.abstract_en: Latent reasoning via continuous chain-of-thoughts (Latent CoT) has emerged as apromising alternative to discrete CoT reasoning. Operating in continuous spaceincreases expressivity and has been hypothesized to enable superposition: the …

papers.title_en: LoSA: Locality Aware Sparse Attention for Block-Wise Diffusion Language Models
papers.tldr: 块级扩散语言模型（DLM）支持多标记并行生成，是自回归解码的有力替代方案，但在长文本场景下受限于内存受限的注意力机制。本文提出LoSA（局部感知稀疏注意力），通过利用局部性特征优化注意力计算，旨在解决DLM在处理长上下文时的效率瓶颈，在保持生成质量的同时显著提升了推理性能。
papers.abstract_en: Block-wise diffusion language models (DLMs) generate multiple tokens in any order,offering a promising alternative to the autoregressive decoding pipeline. However,they still remain bottlenecked by memory-bound attention in long-context scenarios …

papers.title_en: CXR-LT 2026 Challenge: Multi-Center Long-Tailed and Zero Shot Chest X-ray Classification
papers.tldr: 本研究针对胸部X光（CXR）自动诊断中存在的长尾分布和开放世界临床环境挑战，提出了CXR-LT 2026挑战赛。传统基准通常依赖单中心封闭数据集，难以应对现实中的罕见病症和跨机构差异。该挑战赛通过多中心数据，重点考察模型在长尾类别及零样本分类上的表现，旨在提升医疗AI在复杂现实场景下的泛化能力与临床实用性。
papers.abstract_en: Chest X-ray (CXR) interpretation is hindered by the long-tailed distribution ofpathologies and the open-world nature of clinical environments. Existingbenchmarks often rely on closed-set classes from a single institution, failing to …

papers.title_en: How Hypocritical Is Your LLM judge? Listener-Speaker Asymmetries in the Pragmatic Competence of Large Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了大语言模型（LLM）在语用能力上的“言行不一”，即作为生成者（说话者）与评判者（听话者）时的表现差异。通过对比分析模型在两种角色下的语用表现，揭示了LLM在理解与应用语用原则时存在显著的不对称性。该研究为评估LLM的语言知识一致性提供了新视角，指出了模型在复杂沟通任务中的局限性。
papers.abstract_en: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly studied as repositories of linguisticknowledge. In this line of work, models are commonly evaluated both as generatorsof language and as judges of linguistic output, yet these two roles are rarely …

papers.title_en: MARCH: Multi-Agent Radiology Clinical Hierarchy for CT Report Generation
papers.tldr: 本研究针对3D放射科报告生成中存在的临床幻觉和缺乏迭代验证的问题，提出了MARCH框架。该框架引入多智能体临床层级结构，模拟人类放射科医生的协作与复核流程，通过多智能体间的迭代验证，显著提升了CT报告生成的准确性并降低了错误率。
papers.abstract_en: Automated 3D radiology report generation often suffers from clinical hallucinationsand a lack of the iterative verification found in human practice. While recent Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have advanced the field, they typically operate as …
